text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon is trying out her signature
racewear at today's training to see how it feels
while running.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Commencing ramp training. Trainer, please
provide specific instruc—

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer?

The more I look, the more I can't help but think
her outfit is straight out of a sci-fi movie. It suits
her, but I still wonder what she was thinking with
such a design.
choice_data_list: Did you design your outfit yourself?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I apologize. I should have asked for your
guidance.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
You appeared busy at the time, therefore I
consulted with my father instead.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
His exact response was, "Think for yourself. Your
trainer would probably say the same."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Once I heard that, I began crafting a design that I
would consider to be S-rank.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
There are no issues with mobility or range of
motion. I have determined that this design will
allow me to maximize my performance at all
times.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
But your question intrigues me. Do you see a
problem with it?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Curious?

Signature racewear is a very important outfit for a
racer. The emotional attachment is likely even
stronger when they've designed their own.

I explain to her that that is why I was interested in
her reason for the design.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Understood. Do you have some time after
training?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I shall satisfy your curiosity then.
After training, she takes me to...

A planetarium. I suppose this is where she got her
inspiration from.
choice_data_list: Did you base your design on a spaceship?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Not exactly.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
To be more precise, an outer space jet fighter...
perhaps.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Yes. One day, when I was young, my father
turned on the television to check the weather
forecast.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
But instead, a cartoon depicting outer space
appeared on the screen.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
There were red trails of light from a star fighter
cutting through the asteroids.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I was awestruck by its immeasurable energy—its
overwhelming speed and cutting-edge
technology.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My father didn't change the channel. Instead, he
spoke to me as I watched.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I recall him saying, "Isn't that neat? Look at how
fast it's going."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It was a power even my father approved
of—something worth aspiring to.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I responded without thinking.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
"I want to run like that," I told him. "As far as I
can, past the horizon. I want to run with endless
strength."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
He smiled and said, "I bet that would feel pretty
good, huh?"

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My body temperature raised slightly, which I
identified as a state of "aspiration."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
In short, this racewear reflects the warmth I felt at
that moment.
choice_data_list: So that's why you designed it this way...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Yes... I gave it an S-rank myself, but what would
you give it?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Do you find it... odd?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps I should have left the final decision up to
you.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I-I see.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...Trainer's approval of my personal signature
racewear... obtained.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Trainer.

Mihono Bourbon mumbles with slight
embarrassment as we share a heart-warming
moment together.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Do you... really mean it?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
We are completely different from ships that fly
through outer space, though...
I think that's exactly why she admires them. Just imagining all the speed and power of a spacecraft packed into a human form is exciting.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Sharing of "feelings" verified.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Yes, Trainer. It is indeed very "awesome."

Mihono Bourbon gives a small, warm smile as we
continue enjoying the planetarium.
